paper-white.$description: Paper White — Page background, image wells, card surfaces inside embedded UI captures

pencil-gray.$description: Pencil Gray — Hairline borders, panel dividers, card edges, button borders, the dominant structural line of the entire system

graphite.$description: Graphite — Image captions, subdued headings, section labels, timestamp/location metadata

smoke.$description: Smoke — Body helper text, secondary metadata, low-emphasis descriptors

ink-black.$description: Ink Black — Primary text, nav labels, the sidebar bio copy, button text — near-black rather than pure black keeps the system off the contrast ceiling and into a softer editorial register

inter.$description: All UI text — sidebar bio, nav tabs, image captions, button labels. Inter is the safe system-substitute choice; the original is likely a neo-grotesque like Söhne, GT America, or Untitled Sans at a small optical size, tracking slightly tight.

paper.$description: Surface level 0: Page canvas, the only background color in the system. Everything floats on it.

pencil.$description: Surface level 1: Hairline border, divider, and panel edge color. Not a fill — a 1px line drawn on the paper.
